benefit: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000/month after age 60, depending on contribution and age at enrollment. Spouse and nominee benefits on death.
notes: From Oct 2022, income tax payers excluded from new APY enrollment. This changed the target demographic significantly. APY and PM-SYM can both be held simultaneously — they are NOT mutually exclusive.

conditions.source: APY Guidelines — savings bank account mandatory

conditions.description: Must NOT be covered under any statutory social security scheme

conditions.source: APY Guidelines — existing NPS subscribers not eligible
conditions.ambiguity_note: This means organised-sector govt employees with mandatory NPS cannot also enroll in APY

conditions.source: APY Guidelines — APY targets workers 'not covered under any statutory social security scheme'; EPFO is statutory
APY Guidelines — ESIC is a statutory social security scheme; ESIC members in organised sector excluded
conditions.ambiguity_note: Gig workers not formally ESIC-enrolled may still qualify — check ESIC coverage status

conditions.description: Must NOT be an income tax payer (post Oct 2022 rule change)

conditions.source: GOI circular Oct 2022 — income tax payers excluded from new APY enrollments from 1 Oct 2022
conditions.ambiguity_note: Only new enrollments blocked — existing enrollees who subsequently become ITR filers not retroactively removed
